name: Cryo Bladestorm
description: Ayaka's elegant frozen combat style. Swift strikes infused with cryo energy that freeze enemies in place.

abilities.name: Frostblossom Slash
abilities.description: Swift ice-infused strike — 1.5x ATK damage, 40% chance to slow

abilities.name: Glacial Waltz
abilities.description: Spin attack dealing 2.2x magic damage to all enemies, +1 turn to speed

abilities.name: Permafrost
abilities.description: 60% chance to freeze enemy for 1 turn, DEF -20%

abilities.name: Cryoclasm
abilities.description: Massive ice explosion — 3.0x magic damage, resets after 2 turns if enemy frozen

name: Spirit Incinerator
description: Hu Tao's pyromantic guide art. Harness ghost energy and flames to incinerate foes while draining their vitality.

abilities.name: Spirit Flame
abilities.description: Spear strike infused with ghost fire — 1.7x ATK, heal 20% damage dealt

abilities.name: Paramita Papilio
abilities.description: Ghost butterflies strike — 2.3x magic damage, ATK +50% next turn if HP < 50%

abilities.name: Blood Blossom Aura
abilities.description: Enter burning state: ATK +40%, heal from fire damage dealt, lasts 3 turns

abilities.name: Guide to Afterlife
abilities.description: Ultimate pyro skill — 4.0x magic damage, drain 30% enemy max HP as healing

name: Hydro Performer
description: Nilou's star-blessed dance. Graceful water magic that heals allies and supports the party with aquatic blessing.

abilities.name: Dance of Blessing
abilities.description: Graceful healing dance — restore 35-55 HP to one ally, buff healing by 30%

abilities.name: Water Wheel
abilities.description: Spinning water attack — 2.0x magic damage, heal all allies for 50% damage

abilities.name: Harmony Preservation
abilities.description: Party-wide blessing — ATK +20%, DEF +20%, regen 5 HP/turn for 4 turns

abilities.name: Hajra's Hymn
abilities.description: Ultimate star dance — restore 50% max HP to all allies, cleanse all debuffs, +1 SPD

name: Yaksha Protector
description: Xiao's ancient yaksha power. Protective stance with karmic resolution, reducing damage and punishing aggressors.

abilities.name: Lancing Strike
abilities.description: Polearm thrust — 1.4x ATK damage, ignore 20% of enemy DEF

abilities.name: Yaksha's Valor
abilities.description: Enter guardian stance — take 25% less damage, reflect 15% damage back, 3 turns

abilities.name: Karmic Barrier
abilities.description: Protect all allies — DEF +40%, next ally attacked takes 10% less damage for 2 turns

abilities.name: Mastery of Pain
abilities.description: Channel karmic energy — 3.5x magic damage, scales with DEF, applies guard mark
